response:
siriragula mahlā 3 || guru mukhi kripa kare bhabat ki jai bin guru bhabati n hoeye || aape aape milae boohai ta nirmal hoave soeye || hari jeeu saachaa saachii baaani sabad milaava hoeye || 1 || bhai re bhabati hien kahe jagi aia || puru gur ki sev n kieni birthaa janam gavaa hai || 1 || rahao || aape jagajivan sukhdaata aape bakasi milae || jeeay janta e kia vecheara kia ko aakhi sunae || guru mukhi aape deei wadaai aape sev karaae || 2 || dekh ki kutambu mohi lobaana chaladiya nali n jaei || sat guru sevi gun niidhania paai tis die kim n paai || hari prabhu saxa meit prabhu meraa ante hoey saxaai || 3 || aapani man chi ti khaae khaae bin guru aape jaei || hari jeeu daata bhabati vchal hai kar ki ripa manni vasaaei || nank sohba surti deei prabhu aape guru mukhi de wadiayei || 4 || 15 || 48 ||  

***
